title: delphinastrum nelsonii
intro: Delphinastrum nelsonii, also known as Nelson's delphinastrum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Gentianaceae. It is a small, annual plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, known for its delicate, star-shaped flowers. Delphinastrum nelsonii has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or salves, and its health benefits include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing.
